name: Rodgers Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp
description: Rodgers Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated in Delaware and based in Woodside, California. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more target businesses. The company was established in 2020 to identify and acquire a business, with a particular focus on the technology and clean energy sectors. Following its business combination, the company transitioned into Enovix Corporation, a leader in the design and manufacture of next-generation silicon-anode lithium-ion batteries.
